coach_notes: For the Marketing Intern (Graphic Design Focus) and Associate Website Designer roles, Figma is a critical gap as it's a standard tool for web and digital design collaboration. For the Assistant Designer – Girls apparel position, teamwork and communication are essential since you'll coordinate with cross-functional teams on product development. Prioritize learning Figma through online tutorials and practice collaborative projects to address the most job-specific needs.

jobs.title: Marketing Intern (Graphic Design Focus)
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Strong alignment with graphic design focus; skills in Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Creative Suite, visual arts, and creativity directly support this role.
jobs.gaps: No explicit marketing internship experience mentioned; may need to demonstrate understanding of marketing principles.

jobs.title: Video Production Intern Summer 2026
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Direct match with video production; skills in shooting, basic video editing, on-camera presence, and creativity are highly relevant.
jobs.gaps: No professional video production internship experience; may need to showcase portfolio or advanced editing skills.

jobs.title: Associate Website Designer
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Adobe Creative Suite and visual arts skills are relevant for website design; creativity and professionalism are assets.
jobs.gaps: No web design or development experience listed; lacks knowledge of website design tools like HTML/CSS or UX/UI principles.

jobs.title: Assistant Designer – Girls (7-16, 4-6x) Apparel
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Visual arts and Adobe Creative Suite skills are applicable to apparel design; creativity is a plus.
jobs.gaps: No fashion or apparel design experience; lacks understanding of garment construction, pattern making, or children's sizing.

jobs.title: Designer II - Security
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Design skills and Adobe proficiency could be foundational, but security focus requires specialized knowledge.
jobs.gaps: No security design experience; lacks knowledge of security systems, compliance standards, or technical design requirements in security contexts.
